title: physai project config
description: Schema for project.yaml — shared defaults inherited by all container.yaml files in the project tree. All fields are optional; they provide defaults that containers can override.

base_image.description: Docker image URI used as the base for containers. Mutually exclusive with base_container at the container level.

base_container.description: Name of a physai container whose squashfs image is used as the base. Mutually exclusive with base_image at the container level.

env.description: Environment variables (KEY: VALUE) injected into the container build. Container-level env is deep-merged on top.
